title: lansium aqueum
intro: Lansium aqueum, also known as the Langsat tree or Lansium, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. The fruit has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. Lansium aqueum is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing health benefits such as boosting the immune system, reducing oxidative stress, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the fruit is often consumed fresh, used in teas, or dried to make capsules, with some practitioners also using it in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
